mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdhDlivItemChgHist :: selectById */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , usr.user_nm AS chg_user_nm FROM odh_dliv_item_chg_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = h.chg_user_id WHERE h.dliv_item_chg_hist_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) /* base.ec.od :: OdhDlivItemChgHist :: selectPageCount */ FROM odh_dliv_item_chg_hist h
